title: Insights
description: Stories, reflections, advice, and experiences relevant to the pre-dental journey.

hero.headline: Insights
hero.subheadline: The Insights section is a space for stories, reflections, advice, and experiences that feel relevant to the pre-dental journey. This is where we share relatable content for students who are figuring things out, learning from others, and trying to grow with more clarity and confidence. From student perspectives and event reflections to practical tips and personal experiences, Insights is meant to feel informative, approachable, and real. It is a place where members can learn from shared experiences, stay connected to the community, and feel more supported throughout their journey toward dentistry.
